title: Bridge Essay: Hemispheric divergence of interoceptive processing across psychiatric disorders.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body-energy — interoception, heart-brain axis, breathing entrainment, spiritus.

**Hemispheric divergence of interoceptive processing across psychiatric disorders.**. bioRxiv.. PMID: 38105986. DOI: 10.1101/2023.12.08.570759. Interactions between top-down attention and bottom-up visceral inputs are assumed to produce conscious perceptions of interoceptive states, and while each process has been independently associated with aberrant interoceptive symptomatology in psychiatric disorders, the neural substrates of this interface are unknown.
